Shared buffer, which is used to store temporary data
generated during internal API computation. This enables
developers to manage the sharedTmpBuffer space and
reuse the buffer after calling the API, so that the buffer is
not repeatedly allocated and deallocated, improving the
flexibility and buffer utilization. For details about how to
